emails.subject: Sherry
emails.body: John, Could you do me a big favor. Sherry has been really working hard and doing a good job. Do you think that you could talk with one of your contacts and get her a pair of Rockets tickets. I know they are a playing the Clippers tommorrow night. I know that no one else wants to see the Clippers, but she's never been to a game and would really appreciate it. Thanks, Errol, X5-8274
